sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current state:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'w':
        b = n['boundary']
        center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b))
        print(f"  ({n['color']}): center={center}, pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")

# Let me also check the blue bar's children more carefully
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 28:
        print(f"\nBlue bar node: id={n['id']}, children={n['children']}")
        for child_id in n['children']:
            for cn in seg['nodes']:
                if cn['id'] == child_id:
                    print(f"  Child: color={cn['color']}, pixels={cn['pixels']}, center={sum(p[0] for p in cn['boundary'])/len(cn['boundary']):.1f}, {sum(p[1] for p in cn['boundary'])/len(cn['boundary']):.1f}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
